description_long: This doll features a highly detailed anatomical design, with exposed musculature and skeletal structures visible on the head, arms, and upper chest, giving it a strikingly realistic and somewhat macabre appearance. The face is partially skinned, revealing muscle tissue and bone, while the eyes are open and the mouth is slightly parted. The doll is dressed in a layered, ruffled beige dress with a wide, off-the-shoulder collar, reminiscent of Victorian or early 20th-century fashion. The arms and hands are also partially exposed, showing anatomical details beneath the fabric. The dress is textured to appear worn and aged, with multiple gathered layers and a fitted bodice. The overall look combines elements of medical anatomical models with period costume, creating a unique and unsettling visual effect.
description: A life-sized anatomical doll in a layered beige dress, with exposed muscle and bone details on the head and arms. The doll combines medical realism with vintage fashion.
description_view_0: Front view shows the exposed facial muscles, open eyes, and the ruffled collar of the beige dress.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the anatomical details of the head and arm, as well as the layered skirt's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head and neck musculature, the dress's fitted bodice, and the layered skirt.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the exposed right side of the face and arm, along with the cascading layers of the dress.
attribute_clothing_style: Victorian-inspired layered beige dress with a wide, ruffled off-the-shoulder collar and multiple gathered skirt tiers, made from textured, aged-looking fabric.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides, head facing forward, legs straight and close together, and torso erect.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with open eyes and slightly parted mouth, no visible emotion due to anatomical exposure.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; scalp is exposed, showing anatomical muscle and bone structure.
